name: Millicom International Cellular S.A.
description: Millicom International Cellular S.A. is a leading provider of fixed and mobile telecommunications services, primarily operating in Latin America under the Tigo brand. The company is dedicated to building the digital highways that connect people, businesses, and communities, offering a comprehensive range of digital services including high-speed internet, cable television, and mobile telephony. Headquartered in Luxembourg, Millicom focuses on driving digital inclusion and economic growth across its markets by investing in robust infrastructure and innovative technology solutions that empower its customers to lead a connected digital lifestyle.
